title: Switching regulator module benchmark fixture
representative_intent: 12V to 3.3V buck regulator module with current budget and thermal margin

requirements.text: Represent 12 V to 3.3 V buck regulator power-tree evidence with input/output rail constraints.
Provide switching loop, inductor/diode or synchronous stage and feedback review evidence.
Track regulator dropout/headroom, current budget, copper width and thermal margin evidence.
Attach proof-pack, KiCad, manufacturing export, regulator margin, current-density, SI/PI and benchmark coverage evidence.

non_claims: This benchmark fixture is repository coverage evidence, not power-supply safety approval or fabrication approval.
The fixture does not claim switching stability, EMI compliance, thermal safety, manufacturability or production readiness.
